texas_v10_rule_basis: Preserve noindex until all critical families are verified
District-grade routing must use direct local or district-owned evidence, not generic or statewide fallback
Legacy/inventory-only evidence does not satisfy California-grade completeness

final_blockers.evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-23 one more bounded official Utah county-local pass. The older public DWS contact page links an `Office Map` at `/jsp/officesearch/`, and that route now redirects to a live official `https://jobs.utah.gov/office-search/` app titled `Office Search - DWS`. The live shell exposes map/search controls, including `search/<zip-or-city>` and `map` routes, but the raw public HTML still contains no county list, office rows, office addresses, or county-to-office contract. The older DWS services locations page still returns HTTP 500, the older DHHS locations route still returns HTTP 404, and current DHHS contacts/customer-service pages still do not publish a county-grade office directory.
